title: dactylorhiza latifolia
intro: Dactylorhiza latifolia, commonly known as the broad-leaved marsh orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly the flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza latifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-diabetic agent, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Dactylorhiza latifolia can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the form of tablets, capsules, and ointments for various health ailments.
